meta.title: Avoiding OT Vulnerabilities
meta.description:
Scott Hollis of PAS talks about the challenges of dealing with the increasing number of disclosed ICS / Operations Technology (OT) vulnerabilities.

- how long does it take to determine if the vulnerability applies to your system

- what is continuous vulnerability management

- some examples where it is hard and how to deal with it

Sorry for the audio not being ideal; we needed to pick it up from the 2nd microphone
